questions.question: Name the 1984 Kevin Bacon movie that had people dancing from coast-to-coast.
What brand of designer jeans were marked with a swan?
What famous singer had hits with "Mandy," "I Write the Songs," and "Can't Smile Without You"?
Who was the first teenager to go directly from high school to the NBA, signing with the Utah Stars in 1974?
Finish the jingle: "You deserve a break today, so get out and get away, to ________________."
